docs.text: Hello world This is a project intended for authentication and authorization. The project is developed in Golang . Designed to be run as a micro service and to be loaded as a sidecar in kubernetes pod.
docs.title: Introduction

docs.text: This is a project intended for authentication and authorization. The project is developed in Golang . Designed to be run as a micro service and to be loaded as a sidecar in kubernetes pod.
docs.title: Hello world

docs.text: Create a user role The command to create a user role. auth role create <role_name> Create a permission Create a permission object which can be binded to any role, This binded permissions are checked against role during authorization. auth add-permission <PERMISSION_CODE> --description <PERMISSION_DESCRIPTION> --resource <PERMISSION_RESOURCE> Bind permission to role Bind the specified permission to the role auth role bind-permission ROLE_NAME PERM_NAME
docs.title: Command Line

docs.text: The command to create a user role. auth role create <role_name>
docs.title: Create a user role

docs.text: Create a permission object which can be binded to any role, This binded permissions are checked against role during authorization. auth add-permission <PERMISSION_CODE> --description <PERMISSION_DESCRIPTION> --resource <PERMISSION_RESOURCE>
docs.title: Create a permission

docs.text: Bind the specified permission to the role auth role bind-permission ROLE_NAME PERM_NAME
docs.title: Bind permission to role

docs.text: BigBucks Solutions Auth Engine 0.0.1 This is REST api definitions. Terms of service: http://swagger.io/terms/ Contact: Jamsheed jamsheed@nsmail.dev License: Apache 2.0 Servers Description URL //localhost:8000/api/v1 //localhost:8000/api/v1 auth GET /me Get logged in user profile information Response 200 OK application/json Schema of the response body { "type" : "object" } Response 400 Bad Request Response 500 Internal Server Error POST /user/changepassword/ {token} Reset the password with the password reset token sent Description Reset the password with the password reset token sent to email Input parameters Parameter In Type Default Nullable Description token path string No token Request body application/json { "email" : "string" , "password" : "string" } ⚠️ This example has been generated automatically from the schema and it is not accurate. Refer to the schema for more information. Schema of the request body { "properties" : { "email" : { "type" : "string" }, "password" : { "type" : "string" } }, "type" : "object" } Response 200 OK Response 400 Bad Request Response 404 Not Found Response 500 Internal Server Error POST /user/reset Send the password reset token Description Get password reset token to email Request body application/json { "email" : "example@example.com" } ⚠️ This example has been generated automatically from the schema and it is not accurate. Refer to the schema for more information. Schema of the request body { "properties" : { "email" : { "example" : "example@example.com" , "type" : "string" } }, "type" : "object" } Response 200 OK application/json { "message" : "message" } ⚠️ This example has been generated automatically from the schema and it is not accurate. Refer to the schema for more information. Schema of the response body { "properties" : { "message" : { "example" : "message" , "type" : "string" } }, "type" : "object" } Response 400 Bad Request Response 404 Not Found Response 500 Internal Server Error POST /user/updateprofile Update User profile details Description Update user profile details Request body multipart/form-data { "firstName" : "John" , "lastName" : "Doe" , "file" : { "externalValue" : "http://www.africau.edu/images/default/sample.pdf" } } ⚠️ This example has been generated automatically from the schema and it is not accurate. Refer to the schema for more information. Schema of the request body { "properties" : { "file" : { "type" : "binary" , "example" : [ { "externalValue" : "http://www.africau.edu/images/default/sample.pdf" } ] }, "firstName" : { "type" : "string" , "example" : "John" }, "lastName" : { "type" : "string" , "example" : "Doe" }, "phone" : { "type" : "string" , "example" : "0000000" } }, "example" : { "firstName" : "John" , "lastName" : "Doe" , "file" : { "externalValue" : "http://www.africau.edu/images/default/sample.pdf" } } } Response 200 OK Response 400 Bad Request Response 404 Not Found Response 500 Internal Server Error Schemas controllers.PasswordResetBody Name Type email string controllers.ResetPasswordBody Name Type email string password string types.SimpleResponse Name Type message string userUpdateProfileBody Type: Security schemes Name Type Scheme Description BasicAuth http basic
